'''The Eye of the Beyonder''' was a legendary artifact. It was said that this relic would lead the one who possessed it toward a map that led to a treasure located somewhere within the haunted [[Jandoon system/Legends|Jandoon system]]. [[Tzizvvt]] claimed that he knew the location of this relic; [[Solomahal/Legends|Solomahal]] then joined him in his quest to retrieve The Eye of the Beyonder and, more importantly, the treasure itself.
